description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script on each job to display the Ruby version (ruby -v), locate the Ruby executable (which ruby), install Bundler without documentation (gem install bundler --no-ri --no-rdoc), and install project dependencies with Bundler using all CPU cores (bundle install --jobs $(nproc) "${FLAGS[@]}"). Define a single job named rubocop that runs in the default stage and executes the test script with Bundler (bundle exec ruby test/nightstar_test.rb). No custom Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or rules are specified.
